title: Scope a segregation-of-duties matrix
description: Enumerate conflicting capability pairs and detect any principal holding both halves.
body: Steps: 1. List sensitive workflows and decompose each into initiate vs authorize vs execute steps. 2. Define conflicting pairs (request+approve payout, grant+use access, write+deploy prod). 3. Map current roles/permissions to those steps. 4. Detect any principal or role bundle that holds both halves of a pair. 5. Report each toxic combination with the affected principals. Rollback point: before changing any role assignment. Validation: the matrix lists every conflicting pair and the scan surfaces all violating principals; clean state has no principal owning both halves.
